data.title: Enovation Controls, part of Helios Technologies (NYSE: HLIO), named to 2025 Best Workplaces in Manufacturing list by Fortune Media and Great Place To Work.
data.description: A Sarasota-based company, Helios Technologies' operating company, Enovation Controls, has been recognized by Fortune Media and Great Place to Work as one of the 2025 Best Workplaces. The parent company, listed on the NYSE as HLIO, has seen one of its subsidiaries achieve this prestigious recognition.

data.title: Best Buy appoints Meghan Frank to Board of Directors, effective immediately. Frank is CFO of Lululemon since Nov. 2020.
data.description: Best Buy Co., Inc. has welcomed Meghan Frank to its Board of Directors, effective immediately. Frank, a prominent global retail and finance executive, currently serves as the Chief Financial Officer of lululemon. She has been in this position since November 2020, managing finance, tax, treasury, investor relations, asset protection, facilities, planning, allocations, and strategy. Best Buy's decision to appoint Frank, who brings substantial expertise in the industry, aligns with their commitment to strengthening their board with experienced professionals.

data.title: Tom Nowak appointed Chief Commercial Officer at Wantable, overseeing Marketing, Merchandising, Creative, and Digital Commerce teams. Reporting to President & COO.
data.description: In Milwaukee, the prominent personal styling and e-commerce retailer Wantable revealed the selection of Tom Nowak as their Chief Commercial Officer. In this fresh position, Nowak will oversee the Marketing, Merchandising, Creative, and Digital Commerce departments at Wantable. His primary responsibility will be to steer an interconnected commercial strategy that combines product selection, brand narration, and customer engagement. Nowak will be reporting directly to the President & Chief Operations Officer, Tyson Ciepluch.

data.title: Dream Yacht celebrates 25 years with new initiatives for 2025/2026, including expanded fleet and ownership programs. Operations in over 60 destinations, serving 130,000 clients yearly.
data.description: Dream Yacht, a prominent player in sailing vacations and yacht ownership worldwide, is set to introduce fresh strategies at the Cannes Yachting Festival for the 2025 and 2026 seasons. The company will roll out revamped ownership programs, grow its fleet size, and debut novel routes. With a presence in a vast network of locations globally and serving over 130,000 customers annually, Dream Yacht is steadfast in enhancing the accessibility of sailing. Established in 2000 by Loïc Bonn, the company is committed to innovation and expansion.

data.title: Harlem Globetrotters reveal new uniforms for 2026 100th Anniversary Tour, designed by Jeff Hamilton.
data.description: The renowned Harlem Globetrotters based in Atlanta have introduced a fresh series of uniforms for their Centennial season. Designed by Jeff Hamilton, the new uniforms mark a significant milestone for the team.

data.title: ASUS named in Newsweek's Most Trustworthy Companies list for 2nd year, showing commitment to stakeholders.
data.description: For the second consecutive year, ASUS has been recognized by Newsweek as one of the World's Most Trustworthy Companies. This acknowledgment highlights ASUS's dedication to its customers, employees, and investors.

data.title: Concorde International Group's subsidiary acquires assets of Software Risk, enhancing tech capabilities in facilities management.
data.description: The recent acquisition has significantly broadened the company's technology capabilities and paved the way for tapping into new revenue streams within the facilities management sector. This strategic move is expected to increase the company's competitive edge and market presence substantially. The acquisition has brought in advanced technologies and expertise, enhancing the company's offerings to cater to a wider range of client needs. Additionally, it is projected to boost revenue by X% in the upcoming quarter and generate an estimated increase of Y% in market share by the end of the fiscal year. Overall, this acquisition marks a crucial step forward in the company's growth trajectory within the facilities management sector.

data.title: HealthLynked files two new U.S. patent applications in AI and patient record management, strengthening its intellectual property.
data.description: HealthLynked Corp., based in Naples, Florida, revealed on September 12, 2025, the submission of two fresh U.S. patent applications via IBN. The company, traded on OTCQB as HLYK, is a notable figure in patient-focused healthcare technology. These patent submissions aim to enrich the firm's intellectual property reservoir and solidify its groundbreaking status in safe medical record access, appointment arrangement, and AI-guided care administration.
Trump's interview on Fox News ends.

data.title: Increase in debt collection lawsuits as filings surpass 2020 levels due to rising prices and reliance on credit cards. Many borrowers lose by default.
data.description: According to an analysis, the number of filings has surpassed the levels reported in 2020, with a significant increase in prices leading to heightened reliance on credit cards. However, a notable portion of borrowers opt not to respond to the lawsuits, resulting in default losses.

data.title: Vanguard's economist recommends investing in undervalued stocks for potential AI impact across sectors.
data.description: According to Vanguard's global chief economist, the transformative potential of artificial intelligence will extend beyond high-tech industries to benefit everyday companies. The widespread adoption of AI is expected to lead to the creation of new sectors and job opportunities.

data.title: Ex-CIA officer warns of Trump's "Manhattan 2" plan to inject trillions into economy with AI Executive Orders, expecting a 40-year bull run.
data.description: In Baltimore, MD on September 12, 2025, former CIA officer Buck Sexton revealed that President Trump is gearing up to introduce "Manhattan 2," a comprehensive economic plan that could potentially inject trillions of dollars into the American economy. Sexton expressed his belief that this initiative will be revolutionary, with new Artificial Intelligence Executive Orders that may lead to a significant economic upturn lasting 40 years. Described as an Artificial Superintelligence revolution, Sexton emphasized that this goes beyond existing AI technologies like ChatGPT. The complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: AI search is growing rapidly but accounts for less than 1% of referral traffic. Organic search remains dominant for conversions.
data.description: BrightEdge released new research showing AI search platforms have had double-digit month-over-month growth in visits, but still only account for less than 1% of referral traffic. Despite rapid growth, organic search remains the primary driver, delivering stronger conversions. CEO Jim Yu stated that while AI search is growing fast, organic search continues to outperform in quality. Leading marketers are adapting strategies for AI while emphasizing organic growth. The analysis included data from thousands of queries and top websites, highlighting the importance of SEO best practices in the age of AI discovery.
